strengths: Extensive full-stack engineering experience across multiple languages and domains (15+ years).
Direct involvement in AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling (MCP, agentic workflows).
Entrepreneurial background with open-source project leadership (GISCollective).
concerns: Limited explicit AI/ML product development experience in the resume (no PhD or AI-focused roles).
No clear cloud platform or infrastructure strategy contributions in recent roles.
Primarily a software craftsman with less emphasis on high-level strategic advisory.
response.justification: Bogdan has strong software engineering credentials with deep technical fluency and entrepreneurial experience, but lacks explicit evidence of AI strategy leadership, cloud platform expertise, or director-level advisory roles. His recent work in AI-agent tooling is promising but not fully aligned with the role's strategic focus on cloud/AI product differentiation.
